word: H340 - אָיַב - ʼâyab - aw-yab' - Be an enemy

sections.paragraph:
Original: איב

Transliteration: 'âyab

Phonetic: aw-yab'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be hostile to, to be an enemy to
    1. (Qal)
      1. to be hostile to
      2. to treat as an enemy

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 78

Part(s) of speech: Verb
